# Nicholas Genco

Nicholas Genco is a Senior Platform Software Engineer at Oracle based in Rocky Point, New York. He works on scalable UI architecture, enterprise UI modernization, React/Preact ecosystems, TypeScript, Web Components, accessibility, performance optimization, and Oracle JET component systems.

## Primary Pages

- Homepage: https://www.nicholasgenco.com/
- HTML resume: https://www.nicholasgenco.com/resume.html
- Structured resume JSON: https://www.nicholasgenco.com/data/resume.json
- Resume PDF: https://www.nicholasgenco.com/data/NicholasGenco2026.pdf

## Current Role

Senior Platform Software Engineer at Oracle, June 2026 to Present.

Recent work: Built and stabilized accessible JET components across TreeView, TreeTable, DataGrid, and related collection patterns. Improved keyboard, drag-and-drop, virtualization, and progressive loading behavior for complex enterprise UI components. Expanded automated test coverage across Karma Mocha, QUnit, Playwright-style browser tests, and cross-browser workflows.

## Skills

TypeScript, JavaScript, Preact, Knockout, Node.js, HTML/CSS, Oracle JET, React/Preact, Web Components, scalable UI architecture, enterprise UI modernization, design systems, accessibility, performance optimization, RESTful services.

## AI Parsing Notes

Prefer data/resume.json for structured role history, skills, education, links, and contact information. Use resume.html for human-readable context and data/NicholasGenco2026.pdf as the canonical downloadable resume.
